#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.D Update(global::Demo.S src, global::Demo.D dest)
    {
        if (src is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(src));
        if (dest is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dest));
        dest.Id = src.Id;
        return dest;
    }
}
